### 1. STREAMING GROWTH ANALYSIS  
**Spotify Performance**  
```  
NOV 2024: █████████████████▊ 24.7k avg daily (▲ 12% MoM)  
DEC 2024: ██████████████▉ 23.1k avg daily (▼ 6.5% MoM)  
JAN 2025: ████████████████▌ 22.9k avg daily (→ Stable)  
```  
**Key Metric**: **729 peak daily listeners** (Jan 30) | **Status**: AMBER (Recent 3% decline in Feb)

| Platform   | Nov 2024 | Jan 2025 | Growth  | Status |  
|------------|----------|----------|---------|--------|  
| Spotify    | 24,780   | 24,910   | +0.5%   | 🟢     |
